dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noDataDescription: Start tracking your health metrics to see trends and insights.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.noDataDescription: Add health entries to see analytics and trends.
analytics.needsTwoCycles: Analytics requires at least 2 logged cycles. Keep tracking to unlock this view.

luteal.notEnoughDataDescription: Luteal phase trends require at least 2 complete cycles with detected ovulation. Keep logging daily to unlock this view.
luteal.shortPhaseWarning: Short luteal phase detected in last 2 cycles (<10 days). Consider discussing with a healthcare provider.
luteal.decreasingTrend: Luteal phase length has been decreasing over the last 3 cycles.

accuracy.notEnoughDataDescription: Prediction accuracy requires at least 3 recorded period start dates.

comparison.notEnoughDataDescription: Cycle comparison requires at least 2 cycles with both BBT readings and detected ovulation.

export.title: Export Data
export.description: Download all your health entries as a decrypted file for backup or analysis.
export.pdfDescription: PDF exports include a summary of your cycle data and trends, ideal for sharing with healthcare providers.

import.title: Import Data
import.description: Restore entries from a previously exported Lavender JSON or CSV file.
import.fileAriaLabel: Select a JSON or CSV file to import
import.keyNotFound: Encryption key not found. Please log in again.
import.noValidEntries: No valid entries found in file.
import.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please use .json or .csv.
import.invalidJsonFormat: Invalid JSON format. Expected an "entries" array.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Changing your password will re-encrypt all your health data with a new key. This may take a moment.
changePassword.passwordRequirementsNotMet: Password must be 12+ chars with a number and special character.
changePassword.passwordSameAsCurrent: New password must differ from current.
changePassword.keyNotFound: Encryption key not found. Please log in again.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.confirmDeleteData: This will permanently delete all your health entries. This action cannot be undone.
dangerZone.confirmDeleteAccount: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

register.title: Create account
register.passwordRequirementsNotMet: Password does not meet all requirements

recoveryCode.title: Save your recovery code
recoveryCode.description: This code is the {strong} to recover your data if you forget your password. Store it somewhere safe — we cannot show it to you again.
recoveryCode.acknowledged: I have saved my recovery code in a safe place.

recovery.recoverDescription: Enter your username, recovery code, and a new password.
recovery.setupDescription: Your account doesn't have a recovery code yet. Generate one now so you can restore access if you forget your password.
recovery.codeDescription: This code is the {strong} to recover your data if you forget your password. Store it somewhere safe — we cannot show it to you again.
recovery.acknowledged: I have saved my recovery code in a safe place.

home.pageTitle: Lavender — Private Fertility Tracker, End-to-End Encrypted
home.metaDescription: Track your cycle with complete privacy. Lavender encrypts all health data on your device — the server never sees your information. AES-256-GCM, no third-party analytics.
home.ogDescriptionWithSpots: Your cycle data belongs to you. Everything is encrypted before it leaves your device. {count} free sync spots remaining.
home.ogDescriptionFull: Your cycle data belongs to you. Everything is encrypted before it leaves your device.
home.ogImageAlt: Lavender — {count} free spots remaining for cross-device sync
home.twitterDescription: E2EE cycle tracking. Your health data stays yours.
home.tagline: A gentle companion for your personal wellness journey. Track, reflect, and bloom at your own rhythm.

privacy.title: Why privacy matters here
privacy.lead: Fertility and cycle data is among the most sensitive personal information you can share. Most apps monetize it. Lavender doesn't — because we can't.
privacy.card1Body: Encryption happens on your device before anything is sent. We use AES-256-GCM with a key derived from your password via PBKDF2 (100,000 iterations, SHA-256). The key never reaches our servers — not even we can read your entries.
privacy.card2Body: Lavender has no third-party analytics, no advertising SDK, and no telemetry that leaves your device. Most fertility apps profit from selling cycle data. We don't.
privacy.card3Title: Forget your password? That's the point.
privacy.card3Body: There's no "forgot password" flow that could expose your records — we don't have them. A recovery code lets you regain access without any server-side decryption. Lose both and your data is gone. That's intentional.

dataStore.title: What we actually store
dataStore.lead: Full transparency on every piece of data that touches our servers — and whether it's readable by anyone.
dataStore.row2Notes: 12 random bytes required to decrypt; harmless without the key
dataStore.row3Notes: Server uses this to auto-delete entries past your retention window
dataStore.row4Notes: Login identity; not linked to personal info
dataStore.row5Notes: Plaintext never stored or transmitted after hashing
dataStore.row6Notes: Stored only if you set up a recovery code; recovery code never sent to server

freeTier.descWithSpots: The first 100 users get cross-device sync free, forever. After that it will be paywalled.
freeTier.descFull: The free tier is full. Cross-device sync will be available as a paid feature.
